understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in each level to win the game, completing all BP35 levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only via MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT, followed by automatic gravity fall until landing. CLICK removes breakable blocks 'x'. Spikes 'u/v' kill on landing. Gravity direction (UP or DOWN) determines fall path. Each level has 2 attempts and 50 turns max per attempt.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in each level to win the game, completing all BP35 levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only via MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT, followed by automatic gravity fall until landing. CLICK removes breakable blocks 'x'. Spikes 'u/v' kill on landing. Gravity direction (UP or DOWN) determines fall path. Each level has 2 attempts and 50 turns max per attempt.
